### Insight 1: jq hook parsing requirement

The jq hook dependency caught us again — hooks fail silently without jq installed. The userpromptsubmit.sh script uses `jq -r` to parse the JSON payload from stdin; when jq is absent the hook exits 0 with no output (fail-OPEN contract), which means NO protection is active. Make sure jq is installed system-wide before deploying hooks.

**Promote?:** maybe
**Applies to:** /implement, /gate

### Insight 2: pyyaml soft dependency pattern

sleep_score.py follows the same soft-dependency pattern as validate_artifact.py: import inside the function body only, catch ImportError and fall back to hardcoded defaults. This keeps the module importable in environments without pyyaml.

**Promote?:** maybe
**Applies to:** /implement
